Thirty drivers of the Pattison Coal
company Joined the strikers today.
Several shots we're fred at negro
strike breakers driving coal wagons
to custom house place at noon. The
negroes drew revolvers and fired at
their assailants. All the nonunion
drivers arrested today for carrying
concealed weapons were released ana
went back to work


Lieutenant Halkins with 30 NOM
bers of the Eighth Illinois national
guard were placed on duty at tho
docks of the International Salt COM
pany this morning. The police made
descent upon the soldiers and took
their guns away and arrested two
who resisted.


Louis Street, n colored nonuuion
driver for Marshall Field q Co. this
afternoon, by shooting into crowd
following him, wounded John Nsu-
bauer In the thigh. street barely
escaped the vengeance Of the crowd.
through arrest.
